response: Yes, Greg Costikyan and John Dolmayan had the same profession. Both were game designers, specifically involved in the development of role-playing games. Greg Costikyan designed and wrote several role-playing games, including *Paranoia*, *Violence*, and *The Creature That Ate Sheboygan*. John Dolmayan was a drummer and songwriter, best known as the drummer of the Armenian-American metal band System of a Down. While their professions were different, both were influential in the game design and music industries.
